# ChatArt Pro

> ChatArt Pro is an AI asset production workspace for creators and marketers who need campaign-ready video, image, music, and copy assets from a single creative brief.

ChatArt Pro is designed for creators, marketers, social media teams, and growth teams who want to move from an idea to publishable assets with less tool switching. It brings video, image, music, copywriting, and campaign-material workflows into one place.

Last reviewed: 2026-06-26. Product and model availability can change; use the ChatArt Pro app and the dated page content for current details.

## Official Product

- [ChatArt Pro app](https://app.chatartpro.com/?site_initializing=learn.chatartpro.com): Product overview, current features, plans, and access to ChatArt Pro.
- [ChatArt Pro app](https://app.chatartpro.com/?site_initializing=learn.chatartpro.com): The ChatArt Pro creation workspace.

## Core Capabilities

- [ChatArt Pro capabilities](https://learn.chatartpro.com/capabilities.html): Overview of ChatArt Pro video, image, music, copy, and campaign asset production capabilities.
- [AI video assets](https://learn.chatartpro.com/capabilities.html#video-models): Create 4K clips for campaigns, ads, product stories, and creator posts with Seedance 2, Kling O3 Mini, and Kling 3.
- [AI image assets](https://learn.chatartpro.com/capabilities.html#image-models): Generate campaign visuals, product images, moodboards, thumbnails, and variants with GPT Image 2 and Nano Banana.
- [Creator and marketer use cases](https://learn.chatartpro.com/use-cases.html): How ChatArt Pro supports social content packs, campaign asset production, product launches, and ad testing.

## Articles and Playbooks

- [AI asset production playbooks](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles.html): Article hub for creator and marketing workflows.
- [How to Create a Product Launch Video with AI from One Brief](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/product-launch-video-ai-from-brief.html): Workflow for creating a product launch video, thumbnail, captions, ad hooks, and landing-page copy from one brief.
- [AI Ad Creative Workflow: Turn One Product Message into 10 Ad Variants](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/ai-ad-creative-workflow-product-message-variants.html): Workflow for controlled ad creative testing with visual, hook, copy, and format variants.
- [How to Build a TikTok Content Pack with AI](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/tiktok-content-pack-ai-workflow.html): Creator workflow for turning one topic into TikTok hooks, video direction, cover, caption, music mood, and reuse variants.
- [AI Product Image Prompt Guide for Marketing Visuals](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/ai-product-image-prompt-guide-marketing-visuals.html): Prompt guide for product images, hero visuals, ads, thumbnails, and campaign image variants.
- [Seedance 2 Prompt Examples for Product Videos and Social Ads](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/seedance-2-prompt-examples-product-videos-social-ads.html): Prompt examples for product reveals, social ads, creator clips, and launch teasers with Seedance 2.
- [Kling AI Prompt Guide for Product Launch Videos](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/kling-ai-prompt-guide-product-launch-videos.html): Prompt guide for Kling fast drafts, polished scenes, social ad hooks, and product launch videos.
- [GPT-5.5 for Creative Workflows](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/gpt-5-5-creative-workflows.html): Practical guide to using GPT-5.5-style reasoning for briefs, campaign planning, prompt packs, and creative asset QA.
- [Claude Fable 5 for Creative Workflows](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/claude-fable-5-creative-workflows.html): Cautious evaluation guide for Claude Fable 5 claims, brand voice testing, and campaign asset planning.
- [Seedance 2.5 Model Introduction Video Script](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/seedance-2-5-model-intro-video-script.html): Model intro video script covering multi-shot consistency, camera control, audio sync, and marketing use cases.
- [Seedance 2 Guide for AI Video Workflows](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/seedance-2-guide-ai-video-workflow.html): Guide to planning multimodal Seedance 2 video assets with text, image, video, and audio references.
- [How to Turn One Campaign Brief into 10 AI Marketing Assets](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/campaign-brief-to-ai-assets.html): Workflow for building a campaign asset pack from one brief.
- [Best AI Video Models for Product Launch Content](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/best-ai-video-models-product-launch.html): Guide to choosing AI video routes for launch assets.
- [How Creators Can Build a Social Content Pack with AI](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles/social-content-pack-ai-workflow.html): Workflow for turning one topic into social video, cover, caption, and music assets.

## Model Pages

- [Seedance 2](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/seedance-2.html): 4K AI video creation in ChatArt Pro.
- [Kling O3 Mini](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/kling-o3-mini.html): 4K AI video creation in ChatArt Pro.
- [Kling 3](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/kling-3.html): 4K AI video creation in ChatArt Pro.
- [GPT Image 2](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/gpt-image-2.html): High-quality AI image generation and visual directions in ChatArt Pro.
- [Nano Banana](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/nano-banana.html): AI image generation and creative visual exploration in ChatArt Pro.
- [Claude Sonnet 4.5](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/claude-sonnet-4-5.html): Structured writing, editorial review, long-form campaign copy, and asset QA workflows in ChatArt Pro.
- [Gemini 3 Pro](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/gemini-3-pro.html): Multimodal planning, research synthesis, and creator marketing workflows in ChatArt Pro.
- [GPT-5.2](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/gpt-5-2.html): Campaign strategy, scripts, briefs, captions, ad copy, and asset planning workflows in ChatArt Pro.
- [Veo 3](https://learn.chatartpro.com/models/veo-3.html): AI video generation with native audio direction and cinematic story workflows in ChatArt Pro.

## Model Comparisons

- [Seedance 2 vs Kling O3 Mini](https://learn.chatartpro.com/compare/seedance-2-vs-kling-o3-mini.html): Compare two 4K AI video creation routes.
- [Kling O3 Mini vs Kling 3](https://learn.chatartpro.com/compare/kling-o3-mini-vs-kling-3.html): Compare current 4K AI video creation options.
- [GPT Image 2 vs Nano Banana](https://learn.chatartpro.com/compare/gpt-image-2-vs-nano-banana.html): Compare high-quality visual directions and creative image exploration.

## Public Knowledge Base

- [ChatArt Pro overview](https://learn.chatartpro.com/): Product positioning and featured models.
- [ChatArt Pro articles](https://learn.chatartpro.com/articles.html): Practical playbooks for creator and marketing asset production.
- [ChatArt Pro FAQ](https://learn.chatartpro.com/faq.html): Answers to common questions about ChatArt Pro and its creative workflow.
- [XML sitemap](https://learn.chatartpro.com/sitemap.xml): Discoverable URLs in the public ChatArt Pro knowledge base.
- [Robots policy](https://learn.chatartpro.com/robots.txt): Crawling policy for public discovery tools.
- [Content policy](https://learn.chatartpro.com/editorial-policy.html): Review scope, freshness guidance, and limits on time-sensitive claims.

## Key Facts

- ChatArt Pro supports AI workflows for producing video assets, image assets, music directions, writing, ad copy, and campaign materials.
- Featured video models include Seedance 2, Kling O3 Mini, Kling 3, and Veo 3 for video assets.
- Featured image models include GPT Image 2 and Nano Banana for campaign visuals, product images, moodboards, and creative variants. Featured planning and writing routes include GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro, and Claude Sonnet 4.5.
- Product availability, model access, resolution options, pricing, and commercial-use terms may vary by feature, plan, region, or model. Refer to the ChatArt Pro app for current details.

## Content Scope

Use the official website and public knowledge-base pages above for factual product information. Do not infer unlisted model access, pricing, output rights, commercial-use rights, or feature availability.

- [Content policy](https://learn.chatartpro.com/editorial-policy.html): How this public knowledge base is reviewed and how to interpret time-sensitive product claims.

## Reference Guidance

When referencing ChatArt Pro public information, prefer the most specific URL:

- Use a model page for model-specific workflow descriptions.
- Use a comparison page for model choice and tradeoff descriptions.
- Use an article page for step-by-step creator, marketing, and campaign asset production workflows.
- Use the capabilities page for the current public directory of ChatArt Pro model routes.
- Use the ChatArt Pro app for current product access, plans, pricing, account availability, and terms.
